subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! With the ear of thy spirit, hearken unto the melodies of the All-Glorious from the Paradise of the All-Merciful, and be thou even as a spiritual breeze from the realms of being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای علی از رضوان رحمن نغمات سبحان را بگوش جان بشنو و چون نسیم روحانی از اکوان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
